title: Miracle-Gro Evergreen Complete 4-in-1 Lawn Food, Weed & Moss Control, 360 m2, Yellow
features: Creates a thicker, greener and healthier lawn whilst killing weeds and moss

Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1 video Merchant video Previous page Our best-selling grass care product Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1 is the No.1 selling grass care product in the UK. Thicker, greener grass in 7 days High in Nitrogen and Potassium that feed lawns, ensuring thicker, greener grass with stronger roots. Kills weeds Tackles lawn weeds so you can enjoy a healthy lawn, free from unsightly weeds. Kills moss 2 weeks after application, rake out dead moss. You can then re-seed the area with grass seed. Next page 1 No.1 Product 2 Results In 7 Days 3 Kills Weeds 4 Kills Moss The one stop solution to a thick, green, moss and weed free lawn! Enjoy a thicker and healthier lawn, thanks to the unique blend of nutrients and minerals. Watch it grow greener in just 7 days. Helps build strong roots to withstand environmental factors like heat and drought with its WaterSmart formula. Rid your lawn of moss and weeds while building it back up from the roots. Spreader product can be refilled with the carton or bag. Contains MCPA, mecoprop-P and iron sulphate. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1? Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1 is all you need to protect and feed your grass for a thicker, healthier lawn in no time. It kills moss and weeds that compete with grass for space, light, nutrients and water. When should I use Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1? For use on lawns, anytime between April and September, when weeds are actively growing. Apply when the weather is fair, the soil moist, the grass dry and frost free. How do I get the best results? Apply a maximum of 35g per square meter, ensuing application evenly over the area. Your lawn will be greener in 1 week, the moss will blacken and need to be raked out after 2 weeks and full weed control will take 3 to 5 weeks. When can I reseed after using this product? Overseeding or reseeding patches can be done 8 weeks after using Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1. After applying new seeds, Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1 must not be applied until the grass is 6 months old. When can children and pets return to a lawn treated with Miracle-Gro Complete 4 in 1? After applying this product in accordance with the label instructions keep children and pets away from treated areas until the granules have been watered in thoroughly and the area has dried.
